title: Wire ContactPresence into SseEvent::Presence
description: SseEvent::Presence { presence: String } in sse.rs should use ContactPresence instead of String. ContactPresence already exists as a type but is not used here, leaving the SSE event stringly-typed at the boundary where type safety matters most.
notes: Part of epic jmap-chat-tui-hqb: jmap-chat wire up enums — eliminate stringly-typed spec fields
